basics.name: Archelaos Chatzinikolaou
basics.title: Junior Web Developer
basics.summary: Forward-looking junior developer transitioning from business operations to web development. Skilled in JavaScript, React, PHP, and AI-assisted development with hands-on experience in building modern web applications. Eager to contribute to real-world projects and continuously expand technical knowledge.

Development and deployment of client web applications

Contributed to Taxi-Fleet booking system
